title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions:
IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions!
